variants: Zenobia Damani is a family medicine specialist who has made significant contributions to her field. She is also an active member of the Obsidian Gardeners Guild, where she combines her medical knowledge with botanical interests. Her research and projects are primarily funded by the Millstone Kinetics Grant.
